results.natural_language: Rank the top 3 selling genres in each country
results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT country, genre, tracks_sold, genre_rank FROM (SELECT i.BillingCountry AS country, g.Name AS genre, COUNT(il.InvoiceLineId) AS tracks_sold, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.BillingCountry ORDER BY COUNT(il.InvoiceLineId) DESC) AS genre_rank FROM Invoice i JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY i.BillingCountry, g.GenreId, g.Name) WHERE genre_rank <= 3 ORDER BY country, genre_rank;
results.predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ranked.BillingCountry,
    ranked.Genre,
    ranked.total_sales,
    ranked.rank
FROM (
    SELECT 
        i.BillingCountry,
        g.Name AS Genre,
        ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS total_sales,
        RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY i.BillingCountry 
            ORDER BY SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) DESC
        ) AS rank
    FROM Invoice i
    JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
    JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId
    JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
    GROUP BY i.BillingCountry, g.GenreId, g.Name
) AS ranked
WHERE ranked.rank <= 3
ORDER BY ranked.BillingCountry, ranked.rank
results.raw_output:
SELECT 
    ranked.BillingCountry,
    ranked.Genre,
    ranked.total_sales,
    ranked.rank
FROM (
    SELECT 
        i.BillingCountry,
        g.Name AS Genre,
        ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS total_sales,
        RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY i.BillingCountry 
            ORDER BY SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) DESC
        ) AS rank
    FROM Invoice i
    JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
    JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId
    JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
    GROUP BY i.BillingCountry, g.GenreId, g.Name
) AS ranked
WHERE ranked.rank <= 3
ORDER BY ranked.BillingCountry, ranked.rank;

           ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS total_revenue
    FROM Artist ar
    JOIN Album a ON ar.ArtistId = a.ArtistId
    JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
    JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
    GROUP BY ar.ArtistId, ar.Name
    ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
    LIMIT 10

JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY ar.artist, a.AlbumId, a.Title
ORDER BY ar.total_revenue DESC, album_revenue DESC
LIMIT 20;
